title: ScrubHub
shortDesc: Full-stack data cleaning app built with Next.js and FastAPI. High-performance preprocessing via Pandas and NumPy.
description: ScrubHub is a high-performance data preprocessing engine designed to bridge the gap between messy raw data and machine-learning-ready datasets. By combining a reactive Next.js frontend with a high-speed FastAPI backend, users can upload large CSV or JSON files and perform complex cleaning operations in real-time. The application leverages the power of Pandas and NumPy to handle tasks such as missing value imputation, outlier detection, and feature scaling, all while maintaining a low-latency user experience through asynchronous processing.

title: Doors Direct South
shortDesc: A professional e-commerce and lead-generation platform built for Doors Direct South. Features a high-performance Next.js frontend for seamless user experience and a robust Django backend for secure order management and data processing.
description: Developed as a custom business solution for Doors Direct South, this platform serves as a modern digital storefront and internal management system. The frontend, built with Next.js, focuses on SEO optimization and a responsive user journey for customers browsing inventory. The backend is powered by Django, providing a secure and scalable architecture for managing complex product data, customer inquiries, and lead-generation workflows. This project emphasizes performance, reliability, and ease of use for both the client and the end-user.
